title: Amunthirathu Devi Temple
tagline: Amunthirathu Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Amunthirathu Devi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Goddess Sree Bhadra Kali located in Thiruvananthapuram, India.
overview.description: Amunthirathu Devi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Goddess Sree Bhadra Kali located in Thiruvananthapuram, India. The temple is situated at Mudakkal, around 8 km north of Attingal in the Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala. The temple enshrines a Krishna shila idol of the goddess Amunthirathamma, an incarnation of Bhadra Kali. Devi is in Ardha padmasana (a yoga poster), Andarmugha (thinking with closed eyes) and chathur bahu (four arms).

topPlaces.name: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple
topPlaces.description: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple (Malayalam: അവനവഞ്ചേരി ശ്രീ ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം) is a popular Hindu temple in Attingal of Thiruvananthapuram district, Kerala. The temple is dedicated to Lord Indilayappan and is one of the oldest temples in the state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Amunthirathu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Amunthirathu Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Amunthirathu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (23 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Amunthirathu Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Amunthirathu Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Amunthirathu Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Amunthirathu Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Amunthirathu Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mudakkal, Nellanad, Keezhthonnakkal, Edakkode, Avanavancherry.
